category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Intermodal as a command-line BitTorrent torrent-file creation and verification utility; official imdl.io book describes Intermodal as a BitTorrent metainfo utility.
display_name_sources: Official imdl.io documentation uses the display name Intermodal; source_facts.name is intermodal.
docs_sources: Official imdl.io project site hosts the Intermodal book, including usage and command documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/casey/intermodal, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description covers torrent creation and verification; official imdl.io book documents imdl BitTorrent metainfo commands.
